rationale: Section 26.14 governs taxation of property annexed during a tax year. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in §11.13(b); no provision in §26.14 references or depends on the exemption amount.
quote: a taxing unit may not impose a tax on property annexed by the unit after January 1.
_note: No conflict. §26.14 addresses annexation timing and does not reference homestead exemption amounts.
